summary: A Fox News BREAKING NEWS segment with aerial footage of a Los Angeles immigration operation and Acting ICE Director Todd Lyons interviewed in a box, discussing a vehicle ramming and rising assaults on officers. It is a straight cable-news clip, not a produced or music-driven piece, so it is out of scope.
notable_text: FOX NEWS ALERT; BREAKING NEWS: U.S. MARSHAL AND ILLEGAL IMMIGRANT SHOT DURING LOS ANGELES IMMIGRATION OPERATION; Todd Lyons, Acting I.C.E. Director
